====Pokémon==== This listing is of Opal's known {{OBP|Pokémon|species}} in {{aniseries|PTS}}: {{TrainerPoké |trainer=Opal |pkmn=Alcremie |giga=yes |gender=female |type1=Fairy |img=Opal Alcremie.png |cap=Opal's Alcremie |img2=Opal Gigantamax Alcremie.png |cap2=Opal's Gigantamax Alcremie |epnum=JN082 |epname=The Sweet Taste of Battle! |vajp= |vaen=Ryan Bartley |desc=Opal sent this {{DL|List of Pokémon with form differences|Alcremie|Ruby Cream}} {{p|Alcremie}} out to battle [[Ash's Pikachu]]. After a while, Opal [[Gigantamax]]ed her and had her use {{m|G-Max Finale}} on Pikachu. This caused Pikachu to grow giant and fat from eating the immense amounts of cream the [[G-Max Move]] created, so the battle had to be called off. Alcremie's known moves are {{m|Attract}} and {{m|Dazzling Gleam}}.
As a Gigantamax Alcremie, she can use {{m|G-Max Finale}}.}} {{TrainerPoké |trainer=Opal |pkmn=Alcremie (multiple) |gender=female |type1=Fairy |img=Opal Alcremie anime 1.png |cap=Opal's Alcremie |img2=Opal Alcremie anime 2.png |cap2=Opal's Alcremie |epnum=JN082 |epname=The Sweet Taste of Battle! |vajp= |vaen=Ryan Bartley |desc=Opal owns several {{p|Alcremie}} that she lent to the participants of the [[All-Alcremie Decoration Challenge]]. None of Alcremie's moves are known.}}
